issue.title: fix: shipped releases still appear in sidebar — load_tiki_releases reads from archive/

phases.title: Remove archive scan from load_tiki_releases
phases.content: Modify `apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/commands.rs` `load_tiki_releases` (lines 223-249): remove the `dirs_to_scan` Vec/archive-detection block (lines 225-230) and inline a single read of `releases_dir`. The function should only return releases from the top-level `.tiki/releases/` directory; archived releases stay in `archive/` and are no longer surfaced. The frontend already renders `history.recentReleases` from state.json for any historical view.
verification: Manually inspecting the diff shows the archive subdirectory is no longer scanned
No other call sites of load_tiki_releases need to change
